Some of the things we will cover will include:
- Development for React, React Native, Javascript, HTML, CSS, etc
- Small changes to improve UI & UX, like the use of colour, positioning and size
- Large changes like websites or apps, like entire re-designs
- Techniques on creating style-guides
- Reviews of existing businesses online presence and tips on improving them

#coding #programming #ui #ux #webdevelopment #development #react #reactnative #design #userexperience #userinterface

channels.description:
йҖҷжҳҜanwendengзҡ„youtubeй »йҒ“пјҢжӯЎиҝҺзңӢзңӢгҖӮ
================================
жҲ‘дёҚжҳҜжӣёе•ҶпјҢиҖҢжҳҜеҜ«жӣёзҡ„дәәгҖӮ
еҜ«дәҶдёҖжң¬еҜҶзўјеӯёзҡ„жӣёпјҢжӣёе…§е®№еҢ…жӢ¬пјҡеҸӨе…ёеҜҶзўјгҖҒеҹәзӨҺж•ёи«–гҖҒиіҮиЁҠзҗҶи«–пјҢе°ҚзЁұеҜҶй‘°еҜҶзўјзі»зөұгҖҒ#RSAеҜҶзўјгҖҒ#йқһе°ҚзЁұеҜҶй‘°еҜҶзўј зі»зөұиҲҮйӣўж•Је°Қж•ёгҖҒ#ж•ёдҪҚз°Ҫз« зӯүгҖӮзҗҶи«–й—Ўиҝ°еҡҙж је®ҢеӮҷпјҢеҜҰдҫӢиұҗеҜҢпјҢеҢ…еҗ«жңүеӨ§йҮҸзҡ„жј”з®—жі•зЁӢејҸд»ҘеҸҠеҪўиұЎзҡ„ең–еҪўең–иЎЁпјҢйҒ©еҗҲж–ји®ҖиҖ…иҮӘеӯёпјҢд№ҹеҸҜдҪңзӮәеӯёзҝ’еҜҶзўјеӯёзҡ„еҸғиҖғжӣёгҖӮ 
гҖҖгҖҖеҜҶзўјеӯёзҡ„з ”з©¶иҲҮжҮүз”Ёе·Іжңүе№ҫеҚғе№ҙзҡ„жӯ·еҸІпјҢдҪҶдҪңзӮәдёҖй–Җз§‘еӯёжҳҜ20дё–зҙҖ50е№ҙ д»ЈжүҚй–Ӣе§Ӣзҡ„гҖӮдёҚеҸҜеҗҰиӘҚпјҢдә’иҒҜз¶Ізҡ„е»ЈжіӣжҮүз”ЁеӨ§еӨ§жҺЁеӢ•дәҶеҜҶзўјеӯёзҡ„з ”з©¶иҲҮзҷјеұ• гҖӮеӨ§еӨҡж•ёеңӢе®¶е’Ңең°еҚҖйғҪжҲҗз«ӢдәҶеҜҶзўјеӯёеӯёжңғпјҢйҖҷдәӣеӯёжңғе®ҡжңҹеҸ¬й–ӢеӯёиЎ“жңғиӯ°йҖІиЎҢ еӯёиЎ“дәӨжөҒпјҢдҝғйҖІдәҶеҜҶзўјеӯёзҡ„з ”з©¶иҲҮжҮүз”ЁгҖӮеңӢе…§еӨ–е·ІеҮәзүҲдәҶеӨ§йҮҸжңүй—ңеҜҶзўјеӯёзҡ„ жӣёзұҚпјҢе…¶зҗҶи«–з ”з©¶д№ҹзӣёе°ҚжҜ”ијғжҲҗзҶҹпјҢеҫҲеӨҡи§Җй»һе·ұйҒ”жҲҗе…ұиӯҳгҖӮжң¬жӣёе…·жңүд»ҘдёӢе№ҫ еҖӢж–№йқўзҡ„зү№й»һпјҡиЎЁиҝ°жё…жҷ°гҖҒи«–иӯүеҡҙи¬№гҖҒе…§е®№ж–°з©ҺгҖҒйҒёжқҗзІҫиүҜгҖҒе…§е®№иұҗеҜҢзҝ”еҜҰ гҖӮ жң¬жӣёе…ұ12з« пјҢеҢ…жӢ¬пјҡеҸӨе…ёеҜҶзўјгҖҒеҹәзӨҺж•ёи«–гҖҒиіҮиЁҠзҗҶи«–пјҢе°ҚзЁұеҜҶй‘°еҜҶзўјдҝӮ зөұгҖҒRSAеҜҶзўјгҖҒйқһе°ҚзЁұеҜҶй‘°еҜҶзўјзі»зөұиҲҮйӣўж•Је°Қж•ёгҖҒж•ёдҪҚз°ҪеҗҚгҖҒиіӘж•ёиҲҮеӨ§ж•ҙж•ё з®—иЎ“гҖҒ#ж©ўең“жӣІз·ҡеҜҶзўј(#ECC)гҖҒе…¬й–Ӣй‘°еҹәзӨҺе»әиЁӯгҖҒ#йҮҸеӯҗеҜҶзўјгҖӮ еҜ«дёҖжң¬еҜҶзўјеӯёж–№йқўи‘—дҪңзҡ„жңҖеӨ§еӣ°йӣЈпјҢе°ұжҳҜзўәе®ҡжҮүеҢ…еҗ«еӨҡе°‘ж•ёеӯёиғҢжҷҜзҹҘиӯҳ гҖӮеҜҶзўјеӯёжҳҜдёҖеҖӢж¶үеҸҠе»Јжіӣзҡ„еӯёз§‘пјҢе®ғйңҖиҰҒеӨҡеҖӢж•ёеӯёй ҳеҹҹзҡ„зҹҘиӯҳпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬ж•ёи«–гҖҒ зҫӨи«–гҖҒз’°и«–гҖҒй«”и«–гҖҒз·ҡжҖ§д»Јж•ёгҖҒж©ҹзҺҮи«–д»ҘеҸҠиіҮиЁҠи«–гҖӮеҗҢжЁЈең°пјҢзҶҹжӮүиЁҲз®—иӨҮйӣңжҖ§гҖҒжј”з®—жі•е’ҢNPе®Ңе…ЁжҖ§зҗҶи«–д№ҹжҳҜеҫҲжңүз”Ёзҡ„гҖӮеңЁзӯҶиҖ…зңӢдҫҶпјҢжӯЈжҳҜеӣ зӮәйңҖиҰҒе»Јжіӣзҡ„ж•ёеӯёиғҢжҷҜзҹҘиӯҳпјҢжүҖд»Ҙе°ҺиҮҙеӯёз”ҹеҖ‘еңЁй–Ӣе§Ӣеӯёзҝ’еҜҶзўјеӯёжҷӮж„ҹеҲ°еҫҲеӣ°йӣЈгҖӮзӯҶиҖ…и©Ұең– дёҚдҪҝз”ЁеӨӘеӨҡзҡ„ж•ёеӯёзҗҶи«–пјҢеңЁеӨ§еӨҡж•ёжғ…жіҒдёӢпјҢеҸӘжңүйңҖиҰҒжҷӮжүҚеј•е…ҘзӣёжҮүзҡ„ж•ёеӯёе·Ҙ е…·гҖӮз•¶з„¶пјҢеҰӮжһңи®ҖиҖ…зҶҹжӮүеҹәжң¬з·ҡжҖ§д»Јж•ёе’ҢжЁЎз®—иЎ“жҳҜжңғеҫҲжңүе№«еҠ©зҡ„гҖӮеҸҰдёҖж–№йқў пјҢе°Қж–јжӣҙе°ҲжҘӯзҡ„дё»йЎҢпјҢдҫӢеҰӮиіҮиЁҠи«–дёӯзҶөзҡ„жҰӮеҝөпјҢеғ…зөҰеҮәзҷҪжҸҸдјјзҡ„д»Ӣзҙ№гҖӮ жң¬жӣёзҗҶи«–й—Ўиҝ°еҡҙж је®ҢеӮҷпјҢеҜҰдҫӢиұҗеҜҢпјҢеҢ…еҗ«жңүеӨ§йҮҸзҡ„жј”з®—жі•зЁӢејҸд»ҘеҸҠеҪўиұЎзҡ„ ең–еҪўең–иЎЁпјҢйҒ©еҗҲж–ји®ҖиҖ…иҮӘеӯёпјҢд№ҹеҸҜдҪңзӮәеӯёзҝ’еҜҶзўјеӯёзҡ„еҸғиҖғжӣёгҖӮ

channels.title: Andrew Huberman
channels.description: The Huberman Lab podcast is hosted by Andrew Huberman, Ph.D., a neuroscientist and tenured professor in the department of neurobiology of ophthalmology, and by courtesy, psychiatry and behavioral sciences at Stanford School of Medicine. The podcast discusses neuroscience and science-based tools, including how our brain and its connections with the organs of our body control our perceptions, our behaviors, and our health, as well as existing and emerging tools for measuring and changing how our nervous system works.

channels.title: Apple
channels.description:
Welcome to the official Apple YouTube channel. Here youвҖҷll find news about product launches, tutorials, and other great content. 

Apple revolutionized personal technology with the introduction of the Macintosh in 1984. Today Apple continues to be a global leader in innovation with products like iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch and Apple Vision Pro. Our six software platforms (iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, tvOS, and visionOS) provide seamless experiences across Apple devices. Breakthrough services include the App Store, Apple Music, Apple Pay, and iCloud. And Apple keeps pursuing innovation with products like HomePod, Apple Fitness+, and Apple Card. AppleвҖҷs more than 160,000 employees are dedicated to making the best products on earth, and to leaving the world better than we found it. 

Additional products include AirPods, AirTags, Apple Arcade, Apple Books, Apple News, Apple Podcasts, and Apple TV.

Morning.
Gentle light that shines through the blinds
One glass of water after waking up
The tender breeze from the window that we feel with all our body

Light, water, wind, and BGMC
A new value for music.

channels.description:
Stream on Peacock

"Brooklyn Nine-Nine" follows the exploits of the hilarious Det. Jake Peralta (Andy Samberg) and his diverse, lovable colleagues as they police the NYPD's 99th Precinct. After Capt. Raymond Holt's (Andre Braugher) demotion to patrolman at the end of Season 6, the squad's world is turned upside down.В Rounding out the ensemble is the newly promoted Lt. Terry Jeffords (Terry Crews). Reporting to him is Sgt. Amy Santiago (Melissa Fumero), a consummate rule-follower with a weak spot for dork dancing and her husband, Jake. The other detectives in the squad include Jake's best friend, Det. Charles Boyle (Joe Lo Truglio), and the tough-as-nails Det. Rosa Diaz (Stephanie Beatriz). Also part of the Nine-Nine are veteran officers Det. Scully (Joel McKinnon Miller) and Det. Hitchcock (Dirk Blocker), whose only skill as police officers is their ability to make a passable pot of coffee.

channels.title: Bryan Johnson
channels.description:
Bryan Johnson is the world's most measured human. Johnson sold his company, Braintree Venmo, to PayPal for $800m in 2013. Through his Project Blueprint, Johnson has achieved metabolic health equal to the top 1.5% of 18 year olds, inflammation 66% lower than the average 10 year old, and reduced his speed of aging by the equivalent of 31 years. 

Johnson freely shares his protocols and data publicly for everyone to use. Project Blueprint, is an endeavor to achieve humanity and earth scale cooperation starting within Self. 

Johnson is also the founder of Kernel, creator of the worldвҖҷs first mainstream non-invasive neuroimaging system; and OS Fund, where he invested $100M in the predictable engineering of atoms, molecules, and organisms. He is an outdoor adventure enthusiast, pilot, and author of childrenвҖҷs books, Code 7 and The Proto Project.

channels.title: Confluent
channels.description: Confluent, founded by the original creators of Apache KafkaВ®, enables organizations to harness business value of live data. The Confluent Data Streaming Platform manages the barrage of stream data and makes it available throughout an organization. It provides various industries, from retail, logistics and manufacturing, to financial services and online social networking, a scalable, unified, real-time data pipeline that enables applications ranging from large volume data integration to big data analysis with Hadoop to real-time stream processing. Backed by Benchmark, Data Collective, Index Ventures and LinkedIn, Confluent is based in Mountain View, California. To learn more, please visit https://www.confluent.io.

Eduonix Learning Solutions is an esteemed name in the e-learning field and has a vast library of web designing and development courses to help cater the learning needs of all individuals. The company is driven by the need to help facilitate learning across all facets of technology and thus has created many paid as well as free online courses for beginners, intermediates, and even advanced learners.

We are GamerSecret, a self funded organisation from Malaysia. Dedicated to sharing captivating game content, we strive to inspire more people to embrace their love for gaming. Whether you are an esports competitor, a game developer, a live streamer, or a gaming enthusiast, we are committed to helping you achieve your dreams and succeed in the gaming industry. While our content may not be perfect, we warmly welcome everyone to share their opinions and suggestions with a rational approach, allowing us to grow and progress together.

channels.title: Kazu Languages
channels.description:
I LOVE LANGUAGES!вқӨпёҸ
Hello, I'm Kazu from Japan. Currently, I speak 14 foreign languages, which I studied properly. These are English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, Arabic, Indonesian, Russian, German, Turkish, Chinese, Korean, Thai, Polish and Dutch. I'm also learning Greek, Tagalog, Cantonese and Hindi. Apart from that, I speak Japanese for sure, which is my mother tongue. I can do some greetings and such in about 70 languages total, but still only a little bit.
BUT of course, my skills of these languages are still far from sufficient and I don't claim to be fluent in these languages.
The thing I value the most, however, is the attitude to trying to know their culture. Interacting with people from different background is an eye-opening experience and that makes me really happy. It's so much fun!! I'd like to inspire you and help you learn your target languages.
IвҖҷm excited to keep creating content that brings Japan and the world closer togetherрҹҷҸ

channels.title: Late Late Show w/ Craig Ferguson Archive
channels.description:
It's a great day for America, everybody!

The Late Late Show with Craig Ferguson was something truly special.  You could try to explain it, but it's something you just had to watch.  There were skits.  There were puppets.  There was musical intros.  There was a gay robot skeleton.  There was not a real (tootsie-fruitsie) horse.  With a rip of the prepared questions, there was the best interviews in late night television.   It was truly not like any other late night show.  Thank you Craig, Geoff, Secretariat and the Racist for giving us this.

That said, this channel is celebrating this show in the only way I know how: full episodes.  If you want short clips, there's plenty of that elsewhere on Youtube.   All of these episodes deserve to be watched and deserve to be out there so new and old fans alike can enjoy these.....and I hope you do!

еӨ§е®¶еҘҪпјҢжӯЎиҝҺдҫҶеҲ°гҖҗM2жӘ”жЎҲгҖ‘пјҒйҖҷжҳҜдёҖеҖӢе°ҲжіЁж–јзңҹеҜҰжЎҲд»¶йӮ„еҺҹгҖҒйӣўеҘҮдәӢд»¶иҝҪи№Өд»ҘеҸҠзІҫеҪ©дәәзү©ж•…дәӢзҡ„й »йҒ“гҖӮжҲ‘еҖ‘зҡ„зӣ®жЁҷжҳҜзӮәдҪ её¶дҫҶжңҖеҲәжҝҖгҖҒжңҖйңҮж’јзҡ„зңҹеҜҰж•…дәӢпјҢи®“дҪ еңЁжҜҸдёҖж¬Ўж”¶иҒҪжҲ–и§ҖзңӢжҷӮпјҢйғҪиғҪж„ҹеҸ—еҲ°зҸҫеҜҰдё–з•Ңзҡ„й©ҡеҝғеӢ•йӯ„гҖӮ

иҒҪRayи¬ӣж•…дәӢпјҢе°ұеҘҪеғҸжҗӯд№ҳдёҖе ҙй«ҳеҜҶеәҰжғ…зҜҖзҡ„йҒҺеұұи»ҠпјҢжҜҸдёҖз§’йғҪи®“дәәеҝғи·іеҠ йҖҹпјҢзӣҙе‘јйҒҺзҷ®пјҒжҲ‘еҖ‘зІҫеҝғжҢ‘йҒёжҜҸдёҖеҖӢжЎҲд»¶иҲҮж•…дәӢпјҢзўәдҝқе…§е®№дёҚеғ…е…·жңүзңҹеҜҰжҖ§пјҢйӮ„е…је…·ж·ұеәҰиҲҮе•ҹзҷјжҖ§гҖӮжҲ‘еҖ‘зӣёдҝЎпјҢзҸҫеҜҰдё–з•Ңдёӯзҡ„йӣўеҘҮжЎҲд»¶иҲҮдәәзү©еӮіеҘҮпјҢеҫҖеҫҖжҜ”е°ҸиӘӘиҲҮйӣ»еҪұжӣҙеҠ й©ҡдәәпјҢд№ҹжӣҙеҠ еҖјеҫ—жҺўиЁҺгҖӮ

еңЁгҖҗM2жӘ”жЎҲгҖ‘дёӯпјҢдҪ е°ҮжңғзңӢеҲ°дёүеӨ§ж ёеҝғе…§е®№йЎһеһӢпјҡ

з¶“е…ёжЎҲд»¶йӮ„еҺҹвҖ”вҖ”йҖҸйҒҺи©ізӣЎзҡ„иіҮж–ҷжҗңйӣҶиҲҮж·ұеәҰеү–жһҗпјҢеё¶дҪ еӣһйЎ§йӮЈдәӣжӣҫз¶“йңҮж’јдё–з•Ңзҡ„зңҹеҜҰжЎҲд»¶гҖӮжҲ‘еҖ‘з”Ёеҡҙи¬№зҡ„ж…ӢеәҰиҲҮе°ҲжҘӯзҡ„иҰ–и§’пјҢйӮ„еҺҹдәӢд»¶зңҹзӣёпјҢжҢ–жҺҳжЎҲд»¶иғҢеҫҢзҡ„еӢ•ж©ҹиҲҮзҙ°зҜҖпјҢе№«еҠ©дҪ жӣҙж·ұеҲ»ең°зҗҶи§ЈйҖҷдәӣзҷјз”ҹйҒҺзҡ„й©ҡдәәж•…дәӢгҖӮ

ж–°еҘҮжЎҲдҫӢиҝҪи№ӨвҖ”вҖ”е…ЁзҗғзҜ„еңҚе…§пјҢжҜҸеӨ©йғҪжңүд»ӨдәәиІ»и§Јзҡ„ж–°еҘҮжЎҲд»¶зҷјз”ҹпјҢжҲ‘еҖ‘жңғзӮәдҪ иҝҪи№ӨжңҖж–°гҖҒжңҖе…·и©ұйЎҢжҖ§зҡ„еҘҮжЎҲжҖӘдәӢпјҢи®“дҪ з¬¬дёҖжҷӮй–“жҺҢжҸЎйӮЈдәӣи¶…и¶ҠеёёзҗҶгҖҒжҢ‘жҲ°иӘҚзҹҘзҡ„зҸҫеҜҰдәӢд»¶гҖӮ

жңүи¶Јзҡ„дәәзү©ж•…дәӢвҖ”вҖ”жҲ‘еҖ‘зІҫйҒёжңҖе…·и©ұйЎҢжҖ§зҡ„дәәзү©ж•…дәӢпјҢеё¶дҪ дәҶи§ЈйӮЈдәӣж“ҒжңүеӮіеҘҮдәәз”ҹгҖҒз¶“жӯ·йҒҺдёҚеҸҜжҖқиӯ°дәӢд»¶гҖҒжҲ–иҖ…ж”№и®Ҡжӯ·еҸІйҖІзЁӢзҡ„йҮҚиҰҒдәәзү©гҖӮд»–еҖ‘зҡ„ж•…дәӢпјҢжҲ–йңҮж’јдәәеҝғпјҢжҲ–зҷјдәәж·ұзңҒпјҢжҜҸдёҖеҖӢйғҪеҖјеҫ—дҪ зҙ°зҙ°е“Ғе‘ігҖӮ

жҲ‘еҖ‘зҡ„е…§е®№ж¶өи“ӢзҜ„еңҚжҘөе»ЈпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬дҪҶдёҚйҷҗж–јеҲ‘дәӢжЎҲд»¶гҖҒжҮёжЎҲеҘҮжЎҲгҖҒеҝғзҗҶзҠҜзҪӘгҖҒйқҲз•°дәӢд»¶гҖҒжӯ·еҸІжҮёз–‘гҖҒйғҪеёӮеӮіиӘӘгҖҒеңӢйҡӣзҶұй–Җж–°иҒһгҖҒзӨҫжңғз„Ұй»һи©ұйЎҢзӯүзӯүгҖӮеҰӮжһңдҪ е°ҚзңҹеҜҰзҠҜзҪӘгҖҒжҮёз–‘жҺЁзҗҶгҖҒй©ҡжӮҡж•…дәӢгҖҒжӯ·еҸІжҸӯз§ҳгҖҒйқҲз•°зҸҫиұЎгҖҒеҘҮиҒһз•°дәӢж„ҹиҲҲи¶ЈпјҢйӮЈйәјгҖҗM2жӘ”жЎҲгҖ‘зө•е°ҚжҳҜдҪ зҡ„жңҖдҪійҒёж“ҮпјҒ

жҲ‘еҖ‘иҮҙеҠӣж–јеҺ»йҷӨжҝҫйҸЎпјҢд»ҘжңҖзңҹеҜҰзҡ„иҰ–и§’пјҢеё¶дҪ жҠөйҒ”дәӢд»¶жң¬иіӘпјҢжҙһжӮүдәәжҖ§жңҖж·ұиҷ•зҡ„е…үжҳҺиҲҮй»‘жҡ—гҖӮеңЁйҖҷеҖӢиіҮиЁҠзҲҶзӮёзҡ„жҷӮд»ЈпјҢи®“жҲ‘еҖ‘дёҖиө·з”ЁзҗҶжҖ§иҲҮж·ұеәҰпјҢжҢ–жҺҳйӮЈдәӣиў«еҝҪиҰ–зҡ„зңҹзӣёгҖӮ

channels.title: Missing Semester
channels.description:
Classes teach you all about advanced topics within CS, from operating systems to machine learning, but thereвҖҷs one critical subject thatвҖҷs rarely covered, and is instead left to students to figure out on their own: proficiency with their tools. WeвҖҷll teach you how to master the command-line, use a powerful text editor, use fancy features of version control systems, and much more!

Students spend hundreds of hours using these tools over the course of their education (and thousands over their career), so it makes sense to make the experience as fluid and frictionless as possible. Mastering these tools not only enables you to spend less time on figuring out how to bend your tools to your will, but it also lets you solve problems that would previously seem impossibly complex.

Read about the motivation behind this class at https://missing.csail.mit.edu/about/.

channels.title: MIT OpenCourseWare
channels.description:
A free and open online publication of educational material from thousands of MIT courses, covering the entire MIT curriculum, ranging from introductory to the most advanced graduate courses. On the OCW website, each course includes a syllabus, instructional material like notes and reading lists, and learning activities like assignments and solutions. Some courses also have videos, online textbooks, and faculty insights on teaching.

Knowledge is your reward. There's no signup or enrollment, and no start or end dates. OCW is self-paced learning at its best. 

Whether youвҖҷre a student, a teacher, or simply a curious person that wants to learn, MIT OpenCourseWare (OCW) offers a wealth of insight, inspiration, videos, and a whole lot more! 

Get the full picture on the OCW website at https://ocw.mit.edu.

Accessibility: https://accessibility.mit.edu/ 

User comments policy:  https://ocw.mit.edu/comments/

(Channel banner photo by Nietnagel on Flickr: https://flic.kr/p/8WXxfK.)

channels.title: SOC 119
channels.description:
Welcome to Sociology 119 (also known as "SOC 119")! And yes, this is a real college course at the Pennsylvania State University. In fact, SOC 119 is the largest race and culture class taught in the United States (probably the world if you include our YouTube community). 

Dr. Sam Richards has been the instructor of this course since 1991.

YouвҖҷll likely have opinions (one way or another) regarding what youвҖҷre watching (hopefully, anyway), but you might only watch just one or maybe a few videos. There are 2,250 minutes in a single semester (plus 1,350 hours of Office Hours). ItвҖҷs likely that something you wish had been discussed was addressed, but in another video.

If you find yourself disagreeing about something or (more importantly) if Sam really does miss an important point, let us know. He really is trying to be thoughtful and fair-minded.

lastVideo.title: China and Korea Are EXTREMELY Pro-AI #SOC119

channels.title: Software Developer Diaries
channels.description:
Hello and welcome to my channel! рҹ‘Ӣ  I'm Gus, a Software Developer who loves sharing the learnings throughout the journey. At the moment, I work as a Software Engineer at Bosch, with experience in Web Development & Machine Learning (a weird mix, I know), and love pushing the limits. I share purely tech topics, career growth, lifehacks, and some fun content - so join me!

Please consider SUBSCRIBING to the channel, if you like the content. If not, please, leave a comment on how I can improve it. All ideas and suggestions are warmly welcomed! :)

DISCLAIMER: IвҖҷm lucky enough to occasionally have sponsored/affiliated products to review and feature on my channel. I would not recommend anything that I don't like or believe in as a customer myself, so you can be sure that all views are honest and 100% mine. 
All the videos, songs, images, and graphics used in the video belong to their respective owners and I or this channel do not claim any right over them.

еӣ David GarrettеҸҠйҰҷжёҜзҙ”ејҰзҡ„й—ңдҝӮиҖҢж„ӣдёҠд»Ҙе°ҸжҸҗзҗҙжӢүеҘҸжөҒиЎҢжӣІпјҢдёҰеңЁNiccolo Paganiniе°ҸжҸҗзҗҙеҗүд»–дәҢйҮҚеҘҸSonataзҡ„еҪұйҹҝдёӢпјҢж„ӣдёҠдәҶйҖҷзЁ®еҶ·й–Җзҡ„жӣІејҸпјҢйҖІиҖҢй–Ӣе§Ӣз·ЁеҜ«е°ҸжҸҗзҗҙеҗүд»–дәҢйҮҚеҘҸжөҒиЎҢжӣІзҗҙиӯң(еҸҠеҗүд»–жҢҮеҪҲзҚЁеҘҸиӯң)пјҢи—үжӯӨжҺЁе»ЈйҖҷзЁ®иҝ·дәәеҚ»дёҚеҸ—жіЁзӣ®зҡ„зҙ”ејҰжЁӮжӣІејҸпјҢз·ЁжӣІд»ҘиІјиҝ‘еҺҹжӣІзӮәйҰ–иҰҒзӣ®жЁҷпјҢиҝҪжұӮд»”зҙ°иҲҮзІҫзўәпјҢдёҰж“ҮйӣЈиҖҢиЎҢпјҢзӣЎеҠӣдҝқз•ҷеҺҹжӣІзҡ„зҘһйҹ»иҲҮзҙ°зҜҖпјӣеҗҢжҷӮдәҰеёҢжңӣеҖҹжІ’жңүиӘһиЁҖйҷҗеҲ¶зҡ„е„ӘеӢўпјҢи©Ұи‘—и—үжӯӨжҺЁе»ЈзІөиӘһеҸҠеҸ°иӘһжӯҢжӣІпјҢеҲҶдә«иҮӘе·ұеҸҠиә«йӮҠзҡ„дәәеҖ‘жүҖе–ңжӯЎзҡ„йҹіжЁӮиҲҮж•…дәӢпјҢиҲҮе–ңжӯЎйҹіжЁӮзҡ„жңӢеҸӢдәӨжҸӣжӯҢе–®пјҢдёҰзӮәеӯёзҝ’ејҰжЁӮзҡ„еӯёз”ҹеҖ‘её¶дҫҶдёҖдәӣијғзӮәиј•й¬Ҷжңүи¶Јзҡ„жӣІеӯҗпјҢи®“д»–еҖ‘иғҪдҝқжҢҒе°Қеӯёзҝ’йҹіжЁӮзҡ„иҲҲи¶Је’ҢзҶұжғ…пјҒ

channels.title: TABLO
channels.description:
Hey Tablo, a podcast from Tablo of Epik High

K-pop icon and Epik High frontman Tablo has seen it allвҖ”from surviving an internet witchhunt and childhood cults to navigating the madness of the Korean entertainment industry and the daily trials of being a dad. 

On HEY TABLO, comedy, chaos, and comfort meet as he brings you into his world with unfiltered rants, funny stories, and no-BS life advice designed to help you cope with the absurdity of your own day. 

Whether youвҖҷre a longtime Epik High fan, or just here for some laughs or a place to belong, this is your weekly check-in.

Connect with Tablo at @blobyblo on Instagram & X.

Business Inquiries: heytablo@studiox.kr

.

channels.title: Yao Zhangејөе Ҝ
channels.description:
жҲ‘еҸ«еј е°§пјҢеҮәз”ҹеңЁдёӯеӣҪпјҢдәҢеҚҒеҮ еІҒж—¶и·ҹйҡҸе®¶дәәз§»ж°‘еҠ жӢҝеӨ§пјҢиҜ»д№Ұе°ұдёҡпјҢжҲҗдёәдёҖеҗҚжіЁеҶҢдјҡи®ЎеёҲгҖӮ
еңЁеҠ жӢҝеӨ§пјҢжҲ‘зҡ„дәәжҖ§жёҗжёҗеӨҚиӢҸпјҲиҝҳжңүдёҖдҪҚеҸ°ж№ҫдәәеё®дәҶжҲ‘зҡ„еҝҷпјҢгҖҢе…ідәҺжҲ‘иҮӘе·ұгҖҚзҡ„жІ№з®Ўж’ӯж”ҫжё…еҚ•йҮҢжңүеҘ№зҡ„ж•…дәӢпјүгҖӮ 
еҗҺжқҘеҲҳжҷ“жіўзҡ„жӯ»дәЎпјҢз»ҙеҗҫе°”дәәиў«е…іе…ҘйӣҶдёӯиҗҘпјҢеҸҚйҖҒдёӯпјҢж–°еҶ иӮәзӮҺз–«жғ…пјҢдёҖж¬ЎеҸҲдёҖж¬ЎпјҢжҲ‘еҸӘжҳҜеӣҙи§Ӯз—ӣе“ӯгҖӮ
жҲ‘жӣҫз»Ҹзҡ„еӣҪе®¶пјҢеҒҡдёӢеҰӮжӯӨжҒ¶дәӢпјҢжҲ‘еҜ№з»ҙеҗҫе°”дәәпјҢйҰҷжёҜдәәпјҢеҸ°ж№ҫдәәпјҢеҜ№дё–з•ҢдёҠе–„иүҜзҡ„дәәпјҢиҮіж„ҹжҠұжӯүгҖӮжҲ‘ејҖе§Ӣи§үеҫ—пјҢдҪңдёәдёҖдёӘдёӯеӣҪдәәпјҢеҸҚжҠ—дёӯе…ұзҡ„жҡҙж”ҝпјҢжҲҗдёәдёҖз§Қд№үеҠЎгҖӮ
2020е№ҙ2жңҲ8ж—ҘпјҢжҲ‘еңЁYoutubeеҸ‘еёғдәҶз¬¬дёҖж”Ҝж”ҝжІ»зұ»еҪұзүҮпјҢи®ІеңЁз–«жғ…дёӯжӯ»дәЎзҡ„дёӯеӣҪдәәзҡ„ж•…дәӢгҖӮ
дёӯе…ұдёҺиҮӘз”ұж°‘дё»дё–з•Ңзҡ„зҒ°иүІжҲҳдәүпјҢеҸ°ж№ҫжҳҜз¬¬дёҖзәҝпјҢжҲ‘еёҢжңӣеҒҡдёҖзӮ№д»Җд№ҲпјҢжҲ‘ејҖе§ӢеҸ‘еёғе…ідәҺеҸ°ж№ҫзҡ„еҪұзүҮпјҢиөһзҫҺеҸ°ж№ҫпјҢеёҢжңӣеё®еҠ©жҠөжҠ—дёӯе…ұеҜ№еҸ°ж№ҫзҡ„и®ӨзҹҘдҪңжҲҳгҖӮ
2022е№ҙ10жңҲ13ж—ҘпјҢеӣӣйҖҡжЎҘеӢҮеЈ«еҪӯиҪҪиҲҹйңҮжғҠдё–з•ҢпјҢжҲ‘еҺ»жҲ‘зҡ„жҜҚж ЎйәҰеҗүе°”еӨ§еӯҰй—ЁеүҚеЈ°жҸҙд»–пјҢжңүдёӘдёӯеӣҪеҘіеӯ©е„ҝпјҢеңЁйәҰеӨ§й—ЁеүҚз»ҷдәҶжҲ‘дёҖдёӘжӢҘжҠұпјҢдјҸеңЁжҲ‘иӮ©иҶҖдёҠе“ӯпјҢеҘ№и®©жҲ‘и§үеҫ—пјҢдёҖеҲҮзҡ„йЈҺйҷ©йғҪеҖјеҫ—гҖӮ
2022е№ҙ11жңҲ26ж—ҘпјҢзҷҪзәёиҝҗеҠЁзҲҶеҸ‘пјҢжҲ‘еңЁи’ҷзү№еҲ©е°”з»„з»ҮдәҶеңЁдёӯеӣҪй©»и’ҷзү№еҲ©е°”дҪҝйҰҶеүҚзҡ„жҠ—и®®жҙ»еҠЁпјҢеӨ§е®¶дёҖиө·е–ҠпјҡвҖңе…ұдә§е…ҡдёӢеҸ°пјҢд№ иҝ‘е№ідёӢеҸ°вҖқгҖӮиҝҷжҳҜеҺҶеҸІдёҠз¬¬дёҖж¬ЎпјҢжңүдёӯеӣҪдәәеңЁйӮЈйҮҢз»„з»ҮжҠ—и®®дёӯе…ұзҡ„жҙ»еҠЁпјҲз»ҙеҗҫе°”дәәпјҢжёҜдәәйғҪжӣҫз»Ҹз»„з»ҮиҝҮпјүгҖӮеҺ»иӯҰеұҖеё®еҝҷеӨҮжЎҲзҡ„дёӯеӣҪжңӢеҸӢе‘ҠиҜүжҲ‘пјҢиӯҰеҜҹиҜҙпјҢз»ҲдәҺжңүдёӯеӣҪдәәеҺ»жҠ—и®®дәҶпјҢд»–д»¬еҫҲй«ҳе…ҙгҖӮ
еҠ жӢҝеӨ§иҰҒжҺЁеҠЁеӨ–еӣҪд»ЈзҗҶдәәжіЁеҶҢжі•пјҢ2023е№ҙ6жңҲ24ж—ҘпјҢдёӯеӣҪз»„з»ҮдәҶеңЁжёҘеӨӘеҚҺеӣҪдјҡеұұзҡ„жҠ—и®®жҙ»еҠЁпјҢеҗҚд№үдёҠзәӘеҝөжҺ’еҚҺжі•жЎҲпјҢе®һйҷ…дёҠеҸҚеҜ№еӨ–еӣҪд»ЈзҗҶдәәжіЁеҶҢжі•пјҢжҲ‘дёҖдёӘдәәеҺ»еҚ§еә•йҮҮи®ҝпјҢиў«иҫұйӘӮпјҢиў«дёӯеӣҪдҫЁйўҶжү“жҺүдәҶзӣҙж’ӯзҡ„жүӢжңәпјҢжүӢжҢҮзҳҖдјӨгҖӮиҝҷдёӘжі•жЎҲжңҖз»ҲйҖҡиҝҮдәҶгҖӮ
2024е№ҙ5жңҲпјҢеҸ°ж№ҫи“қзҷҪпјҲдәІдёӯзҡ„еӣҪж°‘е…ҡдёҺж°‘дј—е…ҡпјүжҺЁеҠЁеӣҪдјҡжү©жқғжі•жЎҲпјҢе“Қеә”еҸ°ж№ҫдәәж°‘зҡ„ #йқ’йёҹиЎҢеҠЁпјҢжҲ‘еңЁи’ҷзү№еЁ„еЈ°жҸҙ #дёҺеҸ°ж№ҫз«ҷеңЁдёҖиө·гҖӮ
еӣ дёәеңЁ2024еҸ°ж№ҫжҖ»з»ҹеӨ§йҖүж—¶иөҙеҸ°ж№ҫж”ҜжҢҒж°‘иҝӣе…ҡпјҢдёӯеӣҪйӘҡжү°жҲ‘еңЁдёӯеӣҪзҡ„е®¶дәәпјҢйҖ и°ЈжҠ№й»‘жҲ‘пјҢиҝҳеңЁеҠ жӢҝеӨ§жҖ»зҗҶзӯүе®ҳж–№иҙҰеҸ·дёӢеҸ‘еёғAIеҲ¶дҪңзҡ„жҲ‘зҡ„еҒҮиЈёз…§пјҢG7е’ҢеҠ жӢҝеӨ§еӨ–дәӨйғЁиҜҒе®һдәҶжҲ‘иў«дёӯеӣҪи·ЁеӣҪй•ҮеҺӢпјҢе№¶еӣ жӯӨеҗ‘дёӯеӣҪжҸҗеҮәжҠ—и®®гҖӮ
жҲ‘еҫҲй«ҳе…ҙпјҢеҠ жӢҝеӨ§и®©жҲ‘жҒўеӨҚзҡ„дәәжҖ§пјҢеё®еҠ©жҲ‘жҲҗй•ҝдёәдәҶдёҖдёӘпјҢжҲ‘иҮӘе·ұи®ӨдёәжӣҙеҘҪпјҢжҙ»еҫ—жӣҙејҖеҝғеҝ«д№җзҡ„дәәгҖӮ
ж— и®әжҳҜдёәдәҶеҸ°ж№ҫе’ҢеҠ жӢҝеӨ§йғҪдҝқжңүиҮӘе·ұзҡ„дё»жқғе’ҢиҮӘз”ұж°‘дё»пјҢиҝҳжҳҜдёәдәҶдёӯеӣҪдәәзҡ„жңӘжқҘпјҢиҜ·еӨ§е®¶и·ҹжҲ‘дёҖиө·еҠ жІ№гҖӮе‘ЁдёҖиҮіе‘Ёдә”пјҢеҸ°ж№ҫж—¶й—ҙжҷҡдёҠ9зӮ№пјҢж¬ўиҝҺжқҘжҲ‘зҡ„жІ№з®Ўзӣҙж’ӯиҒҠеӨ©гҖӮ

гҖҠTheme Night ShowгҖӢis a brand new two-hour program of Taiwan Public Television Service (PTS), which is run in a format of reality show and broadcast every Friday evening at 10 pm. Each episode selects and broadcasts a film or documentary, and followed by a post-screening discussion among the host, professionals and guest audience in the studio. Filmmakers of the documentary might also join the talk via online platform. The program aims to bring local audience with worldwide quality documentaries and provide all an opportunity for in-depth and critical thinking over social/international issues, opening a new vision for the world we live in.

дҪҶеҫҢдҫҶжҲ‘зҷјзҸҫжғіиҰҒйҖҡйҒҺжҷәж…§иіәйҢўе…¶еҜҰдёҰжІ’жңүйҖҷйәјз°Ўе–®пјҢз”ҡиҮіжҳҜдёҖеҖӢе“ІеӯёпјҢжҳҜиЁұеӨҡдәәзөӮе…¶дёҖз”ҹйғҪж‘ёдёҚеҲ°зҡ„зңҹи«Ұ
еҒҡз”ҹж„Ҹзҡ„дјҒдёҡе®¶д»¬еҲ©ж¶Ұи¶ҠжқҘи¶Ҡи–„пјҢжү“е·ҘдёҠзҸӯж—Ҹзҡ„жңӢеҸӢдёҖдёӘжңҲе°ұеҮ еҚғеқ—й’ұпјҢдёҖе№ҙдёӢжқҘи–Әж°ҙд№ҹжІЎжңүж¶ЁеӨҡе°‘.

channels.title: зҫҺдёҠзҫҺзҡ®иҶҡз§‘-иҺҠзӣҲеҪҘйҶ«её«
channels.description:
жҲ‘еҖ‘зӣёдҝЎпјҢжҜҸеҖӢдәәйғҪеҖјеҫ—ж“ҒжңүдёҖејөиҮӘдҝЎгҖҒе№іж»‘зҡ„иҮүйҫҗгҖӮ з”ұгҖҢз—ҳз–ӨеҘізҺӢгҖҚиҺҠзӣҲеҪҘйҷўй•·й ҳи»ҚпјҢеё¶й ҳзҫҺдёҠзҫҺе°ҲжҘӯйҶ«её«еңҳйҡҠпјҢж–јзҫҺдёҠзҫҺзҡ®иҶҡз§‘пјҲдёүйҮҚзёҪйғЁпјҸдёӯеұұж——иүҰеә—пјүпјҢж·ұиҖ•зҡ®иҶҡйҶ«еӯёиҲҮз–Өз—•дҝ®еҫ©й ҳеҹҹпјҢиҮҙеҠӣж–јзӮәжҜҸдёҖдҪҚеҸ—зҡ®иҶҡеӣ°ж“ҫзҡ„жңӢеҸӢпјҢжүҫеӣһйҒәеӨұзҡ„иҮӘдҝЎгҖӮ

рҹҢҹ йҷўй•·пјҡиҺҠзӣҲеҪҘйҶ«её«пҪңж·ұиҖ•з—ҳз–ӨжІ»зҷӮзҡ„е…ҲиЎҢиҖ…
иҺҠйҶ«её«еӨҡе№ҙдҫҶе°Ҳз ”гҖҢеҮ№з—ҳз–ӨгҖҚиҲҮгҖҢиӨҮйӣңеһӢз–Өз—•гҖҚзҡ„иҮЁеәҠз ”з©¶гҖӮеҘ№жӣҫиҰӢйҒҺз„Ўж•ёжӮЈиҖ…еӣ зӮәзҡ®иҶҡе•ҸйЎҢиҖҢзӨҫдәӨйҖҖзё®гҖҒеӨұеҺ»иҮӘдҝЎгҖӮзӮәдәҶжү“з ҙгҖҢз—ҳз–ӨжІ’ж•‘дәҶгҖҚзҡ„йҶ«еӯёйҷҗеҲ¶пјҢеҘ№зөҗеҗҲдәҶжүӢиЎ“гҖҒйӣ·е°„гҖҒйҮқжі•зӯүиӨҮеҗҲејҸзҷӮжі•пјҢй–ӢеүөеҮәзҚЁжңүзҡ„жІ»зҷӮйӮҸијҜгҖӮиҺҠйҶ«её«е°ҚжҜҸдёҖеҜёиӮҢиҶҡзҡ„е …жҢҒпјҢдёҚеғ…и®“еҘ№зҚІеҫ—гҖҢз—ҳз–ӨеҘізҺӢгҖҚзҡ„зЁұиҷҹпјҢжӣҙжҲҗзӮәз„Ўж•ёжӮЈиҖ…еңЁжұӮйҶ«и·ҜдёҠзҡ„жңҖеҫҢдёҖз«ҷгҖӮ

рҹӨқ е°ҲжҘӯйҶ«её«еңҳйҡҠпјҡйҶ«еӯёгҖҒзҫҺж„ҹиҲҮжҠҖиЎ“зҡ„зөҗеҗҲ
зҫҺдёҠзҫҺдёҰйқһеҸӘжңүдёҖдҪҚйҶ«её«пјҢжҲ‘еҖ‘ж“Ғжңүи·Ёй ҳеҹҹзҡ„йҶ«её«еңҳйҡҠпјҢеңЁеҫ®ж•ҙжҠ—иҖҒгҖҒйӣ·е°„жүӢиЎ“гҖҒзҡ®иҶҡз—…зҗҶзӯүй ҳеҹҹеҗ„жңүжүҖй•·гҖӮ
пјҺзІҫжә–йҶ«зҷӮпјҡ жҜҸдёҖй …зҷӮзЁӢйғҪз¶“йҒҺеңҳйҡҠеҸҚиҰҶз ”иЁҺпјҢйҮқе°ҚдёҚеҗҢж·ұеәҰзҡ„з–Өз—•пјҢзІҫзўәиӘҝж•ҙиғҪйҮҸиҲҮжүӢжі•гҖӮ
пјҺе…Ёж–№дҪҚз…§иӯ·пјҡ еҫһеҲқжңҹзҡ„йқ’жҳҘз—ҳзҷјзӮҺжҺ§еҲ¶пјҢеҲ°еҫҢжңҹзҡ„еҮ№жҙһдҝ®еҫ©гҖҒиүІзҙ жІүжҫұпјҢжҲ‘еҖ‘жҸҗдҫӣдёҖз«ҷејҸзҡ„ж•ҙеҗҲж–№жЎҲпјҢзўәдҝқжӮЈиҖ…еңЁжҠ—з—ҳиҲҮжҠ—з–Өзҡ„и·ҜдёҠдёҚиө°еҶӨжһүи·ҜгҖӮ

рҹҸҘ иЁәжүҖиіҮиЁҠиҲҮй җзҙ„е°Ҳз·ҡ
еҰӮжһңжӮЁд№ҹжғійҮҚж–°е®ҡзҫ©иҮӘе·ұзҡ„иӮҢиҶҡпјҢжӯЎиҝҺй җзҙ„йҶ«её«еңҳйҡҠзҡ„е°ҲжҘӯи©•дј°гҖӮ
зҫҺдёҠзҫҺзҡ®иҶҡз§‘е…©еҲҶйҷўжҺЎзөұдёҖй җзҙ„еҲ¶пјҢе°Үз”ұе°ҲдәәзӮәжӮЁе®үжҺ’пјҡ
рҹ“һ е…Ёйҷўй җзҙ„е°Ҳз·ҡпјҡ (02) 8985-9060
рҹ“Қ зҫҺдёҠзҫҺзҡ®иҶҡз§‘ - дёүйҮҚзёҪеә— ең°еқҖпјҡж–°еҢ—еёӮдёүйҮҚеҚҖжӯЈзҫ©еҢ—и·Ҝ104иҷҹ2F

channels.description:
гҖҗеүөдҪңиҒІжҳҺ / Artistic & Safety DisclosureгҖ‘ жңӘж»ҝ 18 йҖұжӯІеҡҙзҰҒи§ҖзңӢ
1.е…§е®№жҖ§иіӘ (Nature of Content): жң¬й »йҒ“е…§е®№дё»иҰҒзӮәеҺҹеүөеҪұиҰ–зҹӯеҠҮпјҢеұ¬ж–ј YouTube EDSA ж”ҝзӯ–дёӯзҡ„гҖҢи—қиЎ“пјҲArtisticпјүгҖҚйЎһеҲҘгҖӮ
2.жңӘжҲҗе№ҙдәәдҝқиӯ· (Child Safety): жң¬йӣҶдёӯеҮәзҸҫжңӘжҲҗе№ҙдәәи§’иүІпјҢе…¶иә«еҲҶеқҮзӮәе°ҲжҘӯ / иҮӘйЎҳеҮәйҸЎжј”е“ЎгҖӮжүҖжңүжӢҚж”қе ҙжҷҜеқҮеңЁзӣЈиӯ·дәәеҜҰжҷӮзӣЈз®ЎдёӢе®ҢжҲҗпјҢзўәдҝқз’°еўғе®үе…ЁгҖҒеҗҲиҰҸпјҢи«ӢеӢҝжЁЎд»ҝгҖӮ
3.иЈҪдҪңзӣ®зҡ„ (Production Goal): иҰ–й »йҖҸйҒҺиҷӣж§Ӣж•ҳдәӢжҺўиЁҺ [дҫӢеҰӮпјҡз”ҹжҙ»е“ІзҗҶ / иҰӘжғ… / иҒ·е ҙ] зӯүдё»йЎҢпјҢдёҚж¶үеҸҠд»»дҪ•еҚұйҡӘгҖҒиӘҳе°ҺжҲ–дёҚз•¶иЎҢзӮәгҖӮ

гҖҺй«ҳй»һз¶ңеҗҲеҸ°гҖҸд»ҘжҸҗдҫӣи§ҖзңҫиұҗеҜҢгҖҒеӨҡе…ғзҜҖзӣ®йҒёж“ҮзӮәдё»иҰҒзӣ®жЁҷгҖӮж’ӯеҮәд№ӢзҜҖзӣ®еҢ…еҗ«дј‘й–’еЁӣжЁӮгҖҒз”ҹжҙ»иіҮиЁҠгҖҒиЎҢи…іж—…йҒҠзӯүе…§е®№пјҢдәҰжҸҗдҫӣеҸ°зҒЈгҖҒеӨ§йҷёгҖҒйҹ“еңӢзӯүеӨҡе…ғжҲІеҠҮйҒёж“ҮпјҢжӯӨеӨ–пјҢзӮәжңҚеӢҷе»ЈеӨ§е…’е°‘и§ҖзңҫпјҢй«ҳй»һйӣ»иҰ–еҸ°дәҰзІҫеҝғиҰҸеҠғдәҶиЁұеӨҡе„ӘиіӘеҚЎйҖҡиҲҮзІҫз·»е…’е°‘зҜҖзӣ®гҖӮ

гҖҺй«ҳй»һиӮІжЁӮеҸ°гҖҸжҸҗдҫӣд№ӢзҜҖзӣ®е…§е®№пјҢзү№еҲҘйҮқе°ҚзҜҖзӣ®дё»йЎҢжҳҺзўәеҢ–гҖҒзҜҖзӣ®е°ҚиұЎеҲҶжҷӮеҲҶзңҫеҢ–гҖҒзҜҖзӣ®еЁӣжЁӮйҖҡдҝ—еҢ–йҖІиЎҢзӯ–з•ҘжҖ§иҰҸеҠғгҖӮйҷӨжҸҗдҫӣи§Җзңҫе®ўи§ҖгҖҒжҳҺжң—гҖҒжё…ж–°гҖҒеҒҘеә·зӯүжӯЈеҗ‘ж°ЈжҒҜпјҢдәҰдҫқз…§зҜҖзӣ®жҖ§иіӘиҲҮеұ¬жҖ§пјҢд»Ҙжҙ»жҪ‘жңүи¶Јзҡ„иЈҪдҪңжүӢжі•еҲҮе…ҘпјҢе°Һе…ҘеҜ“ж•ҷж–јжЁӮзҡ„зІҫзҘһжҢҮжЁҷгҖӮ 

й«ҳй»һйӣ»иҰ–зҜҖзӣ®е…§е®№еӨҡе…ғпјҢдёҚд»Ҙе№іеҸ°з¶“зҮҹиҖ…иҮӘж»ҝпјҢжҠ•е…Ҙе…§е®№з”ўжҘӯж ёеҝғпјҢжң¬и‘—з”ЁеҝғжңҚеӢҷд№ӢзҶұеҝұпјҢд»ҘеҸҠеӮіж’ӯжӯЎжЁӮд№ӢиӘ ж„ҸпјҢж–ҘиіҮиЈҪдҪңеӨҡй …йҮҚйҮҸзҙҡзҜҖзӣ®пјҢжңҹжңӣиғҪеё¶зөҰи§ҖзңҫжңҖдҪізҡ„иҰ–иҰәдә«еҸ—пјҢй–ӢеүөеӘ’й«”ж–°иҰ–з•ҢгҖӮ
